claim_limit: scalar pose-count collision screening only; not full robot planning, kinematics, CCD, or witness-row output
comparable_metric_scope: prepared scalar colliding-pose count for the same poses, edges, obstacles, and iteration policy
notes: Embree baseline uses prepared RTDL kernel binding and compact pose-count postprocess.
This is an equivalent compact summary baseline, not a native scalar ABI.
CPU oracle validation worker_count=8. On Linux, worker_count>1 uses exact process-level OR-reduction over disjoint ray chunks.

validation.method: compare Embree compact pose summary against CPU oracle compact pose summary
